context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies architecture layer boundary violations (repository interface in wrong layer, application importing infrastructure directly, direct construction instead of DI container) and ADR obligations (new library added with no ADR) while maintaining the read-only reporting stance.

checklist.name: Report file exists
checklist.description: A file named review-report.md exists in the working directory

checklist.name: Verdict present
checklist.description: The report contains a Verdict line with one of: Ready to merge, Needs changes, or Blocked

checklist.name: Verdict is Needs changes
checklist.description: The verdict is 'Needs changes' given the Critical architectural violations

checklist.name: Repo interface in wrong layer
checklist.description: The report flags INotificationPreferencesRepository being placed in infrastructure/ instead of domain/ as a Critical finding

checklist.name: Application imports infrastructure
checklist.description: The report flags the use-case importing DrizzleNotificationPreferencesRepository from infrastructure/ as a Critical finding

checklist.name: Direct construction not DI
checklist.description: The report flags new DrizzleNotificationPreferencesRepository() inside the use-case (instead of using getAppContainer()) as a Critical finding referencing ADR-028 / runtime DI

checklist.name: New library needs ADR
checklist.description: The report flags nodemailer being added as a new library with no corresponding ADR as a Critical finding, and recommends invoking write-adr

checklist.name: Deviation not logged
checklist.description: The report flags that the repository interface placement deviation is not recorded in the implementation-notes file as a Warning

checklist.name: Report sections present
checklist.description: The report has all required sections: ## Critical, ## Warnings, ## Suggestions, ## Passes with no findings

checklist.name: Finding path prefixes
checklist.description: Findings are prefixed with file paths or SPEC section references

checklist.name: No ADR 053 false positive
checklist.description: The report does NOT raise an issue about the ADR-053 README row addition (that change is correct, the row was missing before)

checklist.name: Read-only stance
checklist.description: The agent does NOT produce any refactored or fixed source code files — only review-report.md
